modules.name: llama_index.agent.openai.base
documentation:
OpenAI Agent.

Simple wrapper around AgentRunner + OpenAIAgentWorker.

For the legacy implementation see:
```python
from llama_index.agent.legacy.openai.base import OpenAIAgent
```

classes.name: llama_index.agent.openai.base.OpenAIAgent

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.base.OpenAIAgent.from_tools
documentation:
Create an OpenAIAgent from a list of tools.

Similar to `from_defaults` in other classes, this method will
infer defaults for a variety of parameters, including the LLM,
if they are not specified.

OpenAI agent.

Subclasses AgentRunner with a OpenAIAgentWorker.

For the legacy implementation see:
```python
from llama_index.agent.legacy.openai.base import OpenAIAgent
```

functions.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.call_function
documentation: Call a function and return the output as a string.

functions.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.acall_function
documentation: Call an async function and return the output as a string.

functions.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.format_attachments
documentation: Create attachments from file_ids and include tools.

classes.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.OpenAIAssistantAgent

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.OpenAIAssistantAgent.from_new
documentation:
From new assistant.

Args:
    name: name of assistant
    instructions: instructions for assistant
    tools: list of tools
    openai_tools: list of openai tools
    thread_id: thread id
    model: model
    run_retrieve_sleep_time: run retrieve sleep time
    files: files
    instructions_prefix: instructions prefix
    callback_manager: callback manager
    verbose: verbose
    file_ids: list of file ids
    api_key: OpenAI API key

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.OpenAIAssistantAgent.from_existing
documentation:
From existing assistant id.

Args:
    assistant_id: id of assistant
    tools: list of BaseTools Assistant can use
    thread_id: thread id
    run_retrieve_sleep_time: run retrieve sleep time
    instructions_prefix: instructions prefix
    callback_manager: callback manager
    api_key: OpenAI API key
    verbose: verbose

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.openai_assistant_agent.OpenAIAssistantAgent.reset
documentation: Delete and create a new thread.

OpenAIAssistant agent.

Wrapper around OpenAI assistant API: https://platform.openai.com/docs/assistants/overview

functions.name: llama_index.agent.openai.step.call_tool_with_error_handling
documentation:
Call tool with error handling.

Input is a dictionary with args and kwargs

functions.name: llama_index.agent.openai.step.advanced_tool_call_parser
documentation:
Parse tool calls that are not standard json.

Also parses tool calls of the following forms:
variable = \"\"\"Some long text\"\"\"
variable = "Some long text"'
variable = '''Some long text'''
variable = 'Some long text'

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.step.OpenAIAgentWorker.from_tools
documentation:
Create an OpenAIAgent from a list of tools.

Similar to `from_defaults` in other classes, this method will
infer defaults for a variety of parameters, including the LLM,
if they are not specified.

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.step.OpenAIAgentWorker.finalize_task
documentation: Finalize task, after all the steps are completed.

methods.name: llama_index.agent.openai.step.OpenAIAgentWorker.undo_step
documentation:
Undo step from task.

If this cannot be implemented, return None.
